progutils 0.10.1

Package index

Files and folders

create_dir()
Create a directory
create_file_path()
Create a file path
create_tempdir()
Create a new temporary directory
get_file_path()
Check that only a single matching file is present

Text

check_case()
Check for values that differ only in their case
reexports paste_quoted
Objects exported from other packages
replace_vals()
Replace character values or factor levels
signal_text()
Signal a text to the user
unpaste_unquote()
Create a character vector from a string with quotation marks
vect_to_char()
Convert a vector to a character string
wrap_text()
Wrap text

Equality

are_equal()
Are numeric values nearly equal
check_case()
Check for values that differ only in their case
get_file_path()
Check that only a single matching file is present
not_in()
Are values absent
replace_vals()
Replace character values or factor levels

Order

head_tail()
Show first and last part of an object
reorder_cols()
Reorder columns
reorder_levels()
Reorder factor levels

Type conversion

as.numeric_safe()
Convert x to numeric
reexports paste_quoted
Objects exported from other packages
reorder_levels()
Reorder factor levels
vect_to_char()
Convert a vector to a character string
